# Akshay V T - Freelance Web Developer

## About
Akshay V T is a freelance web developer with 6+ years of experience specializing in React, Next.js, e-commerce, and SEO optimization. Direct communication with the developer - no middlemen or account managers.

## Services
- Custom Website Development
- React & Next.js Applications
- E-commerce Solutions (Shopify, WooCommerce)
- Website Redesign & Migration
- SEO Optimization
- Ongoing Maintenance & Support

## Service Areas
Dubai, UAE | Kerala, India | Sydney, Australia | Qatar | Worldwide (Remote)

## Contact

## Expertise
React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, WordPress, Shopify, SEO, Performance Optimization

## Why Choose Akshay V T
- 6+ years of professional experience
- 50+ websites delivered
- Direct communication with developer
- Fast turnaround times
- Focus on performance and SEO
